title: Software Update - DFU - Updating screen
scenario: DFU update screen shows call interruption warning message during software update from Device Settings
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Tap 'Start Update' to begin the DFU process
expected: The "Updating" screen is shown with a progress bar and a message: "Answering a call may interrupt the update and require you to restart the update once the call ends. To avoid interruptions, we recommend completing the update before using your device for calls."
